_ruled_items: was _confirm: no midship breast bollards are modelled along the tank deck — a 110 m ship would have them at the manifold; flagging the absence for the owner (art change vs accepted). RULED: ABSENCE ACCEPTED FOR NOW (owner, 2026-07-22) — the manifold breast-bollard art addition is BANKED, not ordered; revisit if breast lines matter to M2 mooring.

was _confirm: tank_lane inner edge held at the tank envelope x=±RX=±6.3 — the true clearance past the tank flank overhang is judged passable at deck level. RULED: ACCEPTED (owner, 2026-07-22) — the lanes stand as authored.
